metadata.description: Opinionated Claude Code skills for disciplined planning, proof-based review, clean Conventional Commits, and web security review.

plugins.name: coding
plugins.description: Nine workflow skills: replan (iterative planning), review, review-staged, and double-review (proof-based code review), gitplan and stage (disciplined Conventional-Commit staging), and the Technical Project Plan workflow (tpp, handoff, tpp-orchestrate — multi-session plan files with serial orchestration, TDD subagents, and dual vetted reviews).

plugins.name: security
plugins.description: web-security-review: a best-of-three composite (Sentry, Anthropic, GitHub awesome-copilot) that audits JavaScript/TypeScript web apps for injection (incl. per-ORM raw + SQLite), XSS, authorization (IDOR/BOLA/mass-assignment), auth/session/JWT, SSRF, CSRF, secrets, and crypto — plus conditional passes for self-hosted deployment hardening and OIDC/SSO account-takeover. Reports only proven findings (a proof gate, not confidence scores).
